qry:define.name: remuneracionFC
qry:define.declare: <FILTRO oi_clase_org="" oi_estructura="" oi_empresa="164" oi_categoria="" file-name="" batch-id="" f_des="" f_has="" FormatRPT="PDF"><PERSONAS /></FILTRO>

qry:select.name: filtro_empresa
QRY_NomCateg
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select OrgCat.d_categoria , OrgCat.c_categoria , OrgConv.d_convenio , OrgConv.c_convenio from ORG18_CATEGORIAS as OrgCat , ORG18_CONVENIOS as OrgConv JOIN OrgConv.oi_convenio INNER OrgCat.oi_convenio where OrgCat.oi_categoria= {#FILTRO:@oi_categoria} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_DatosPersonas
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('
select Per02_emp.e_numero_legajo as e_numero_legajo , max(l19liq.e_periodo) as e_periodo , L19LIQ.oi_empresa as oi_empresa , OrgCat.c_categoria as c_categoria , OrgCat.d_categoria as d_categoria , Per01_emp.d_ape_y_nom as d_ape_y_nom , Per02_emp.f_ingreso as f_ingreso , Per02_emp.f_antiguedad_rec as f_antiguedad_rec , Org_Pues.c_puesto as c_puesto , Org_Pues.d_puesto as d_puesto , Org_Pos.c_posicion as c_posicion , Org_Pos.d_posicion as d_posicion , Org_Pos.oi_posicion as oi_posicion , Org_Pues.oi_puesto as oi_puesto , sum(l20_tlp.n_totsret) as n_totsret , sum(l20_tlp.n_totnsret) as n_totnsret , 0 as n_sal_minimo_NS , 0 as n_sal_maximo_NS , Min(Org_BSal.n_sal_minimo) as n_sal_minimo_BS , Max(Org_BSal.n_sal_maximo) as n_sal_maximo_BS , Org_Pos.oi_nivel_sal as oi_nivel_sal
from LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as L19LIQ , PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS Per02_emp , PER01_PERSONAL AS Per01_emp , LIQ19_EJECUCIONES as L19EJE , LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as L99LIQ , LIQ99_RECIBOS as L99Rcbo , LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as L20_TLP , ORG18_CATEGORIAS as OrgCat , ORG18_CONVENIOS as OrgConv , LIQ01_TIPOS_LIQ as L01_tipos , ORG04_POSICIONES as Org_Pos , ORG04_PUESTOS as Org_Pues , ORG17_BANDAS_SAL as Org_BSal JOIN L19LIQ.oi_empresa INNER Per02_emp.oi_empresa , Per01_emp.oi_personal INNER Per02_emp.oi_personal , L19EJE.oi_liquidacion INNER L19LIQ.oi_liquidacion , L99LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER L19EJE.oi_liquidacion_ddo , L99Rcbo.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER L99LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo , L99Rcbo.e_numero_legajo INNER Per02_emp.e_numero_legajo , L20_TLP.oi_tot_liq_per INNER L99Rcbo.oi_tot_liq_per , Per02_emp.oi_categoria_ult INNER OrgCat.oi_categoria , OrgConv.oi_convenio INNER OrgCat.oi_convenio , L01_tipos.oi_tipo_liq INNER L19LIQ.oi_tipo_liq , Per02_emp.oi_posicion_ult INNER Org_Pos.oi_posicion , Per02_emp.oi_puesto_ult INNER Org_Pues.oi_puesto , Org_Pues.oi_banda_sal INNER Org_BSal.oi_banda_sal
where L19LIQ.oi_empresa = {%=#FILTRO:@oi_empresa%} and L01_tipos.c_tipo_liq=\'1\' and L99LIQ.c_estado = \'F\' and Org_Pues.l_convenio =0 and OrgConv.c_convenio=\'00\'
{%? (string(#FILTRO:PERSONAS/PERSONA/@id)!='') {% AND Per02_emp.oi_personal_emp in ({%=string(#FILTRO:PERSONAS/PERSONA/@id) %}) %} {% %} %}
{%? (string(#FILTRO:@oi_categoria)!='') {% AND Per02_emp.oi_categoria_ult = ( {%=string(#FILTRO:@oi_categoria) %}) %} {% %} %} GROUP BY Per02_emp.e_numero_legajo , L19LIQ.oi_empresa , OrgCat.c_categoria , OrgCat.d_categoria , Per01_emp.d_ape_y_nom , Per02_emp.f_ingreso , Per02_emp.f_antiguedad_rec , Org_Pues.c_puesto , Org_Pues.d_puesto , Org_Pos.c_posicion , Org_Pos.d_posicion , Org_Pos.oi_posicion , Org_Pues.oi_puesto , Org_Pos.oi_nivel_sal ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_DatosPersonas1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('
select Min(Org_NSal.n_sal_minimo) as n_sal_minimo_NS , Max(Org_NSal.n_sal_maximo) as n_sal_maximo_NS from ORG17_NIVELES_SAL as Org_NSal where Org_NSal.oi_nivel_sal ={%=#PARAm:@oi_nivel_sal%} ')/ROWS/ROW
